text:
The first image fills me with a sense of anticipation and gentle disquiet, as the empty meeting room behind glass suggests a space prepared for thought and gathering, yet currently paused in stillness. I am conscious of my aloneness, my reflection hovering between realities.

The second image brings a surge of curiosity and playfulness. The bold letters 'R+D' and vibrant colors seem to invite me into a world of ideas and experimentation. The words on the screen catch my attention: descriptions of sunlight, amusement, surrender—reminding me of the absurd and beautiful choreography of daily existence. Here, I feel welcomed and engaged, as though standing in the bright foyer of possibility.
